flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Saint Louis University rose 19% between 2006 and 2009 ($26.2k → $31.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Saint Louis University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($48.8k → $55.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Saint Louis University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Saint Louis University are 52% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($70.8k vs $46.7k).
